name: breathe-the-simple-revolutionary-14-day-program-to-improve-your-mental-and-physical-health
description: Dr. Belisa Vranich's breathing retraining program — a 14-day protocol to correct dysfunctional breathing patterns using anatomy, neuroscience, and daily practice.
useCase: Learn correct breathing, reduce anxiety, improve athletic performance, and retrain your respiratory system in 14 days.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical treatment for diagnosed respiratory conditions
Breathing exercises may cause initial lightheadedness
Consult a physician before starting if you have serious respiratory issues
